title: 4PC T BAR Spark Plug Wrench Set Heavy Duty Chrome Spark Plug Removal 16mm 18mm & 21mm Tool Wrench Non-Slip Grip T-Handle T-Bar Flexible Spanner Socket 4-17
description: Brand new and high-quality spark plug removal tool. Comfortable to use a non-slip dipped handle. T-Handle Bar allows larger Torque force and high pursuance. Come with 16mm (5/8") & 21mm (13/16") Sockets fits most Spark Plugs (Please confirm the size of the spark plug prior to purchase) Flexible head allows access to confined areas. Plastic coated T handle - allows a good grip. T handle has a 3/8" drive fitting that can be used with any 3/8" drive Socket. Socket made from chrome vanadium steel. Rubber insert within sockets for spark plug insulator protection and spark plug retention. Comes with the widespread joint function for enhanced access. Suitable for fastening and demolition of the spark plug sleeve. ............................................. Specifications: ............................................. 16mm (5/8") & 21mm (13/16") Sockets fit most Spark Plugs Socket length: 60mm (Total), 40mm (Internal) -approx. Tool length T handle: 160mm - approx. Socket length: 60mm (Total) 40mm (Internal) - approx. ............................................. Package Content: ............................................. Spark Plug Removal Tool 16mm & 21mm T-Bar T-Handle
